assignments.name: error_message
assignments.value: ={{ $json.patient_id ? ($json.appointment_id ? 'Required fields missing for appointment processing' : 'Appointment ID not provided') : 'Patient information incomplete' }}

assignments.name: resolution_suggestion
assignments.value: ={{ $json.patient_id ? ($json.appointment_id ? 'Please provide all required fields: patient_id, doctor_name, date, time' : 'Please provide appointment ID for modification requests') : 'Please provide complete patient information including ID, name, and contact details' }}
